meta.title: 教育公平与创新
meta.description: Upper-intermediate education equity and innovation vocabulary and grammar in Chinese: resource distribution and teaching philosophy.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 중급~중상급 교육 형평성·혁신 어휘와 문형: 자원 분배, 교육 이념.

questions.prompt: 「教育公平」是什么意思？(What does 教育公平 mean?)
「创新能力」是什么意思？(What does 创新能力 mean?)

explanation.en: 「因材施教」(yīncái shījiào) is an idiom meaning "to teach according to each student's aptitude".
explanation.ko: 「因材施教」(yīncái shījiào)는 '학생의 능력에 맞춰 가르치다'라는 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「因材施教」是什么意思？(What does 因材施教 mean?)
choices: 因材施教(teaching according to students' aptitude)

explanation.en: 「教育公平性」relates to the fair distribution of educational resources.
explanation.ko: 「教育公平性」는 교육 자원의 공평한 분배와 관련이 있다.

questions.prompt: 「教育公平性」涉及什么问题？(What issues does 教育公平性 involve?)
choices: 教育资源分配(distribution of educational resources)

questions.prompt: 「教育理念」是什么意思？(What does 教育理念 mean?)
实现___需要缩小城乡教育资源的差距。(Achieving educational equity requires narrowing the gap in educational resources between urban and rural areas.)
学校应该更加注重培养学生的___，而不只是死记硬背。(Schools should place more emphasis on cultivating students' innovation ability, rather than just rote memorization.)

explanation.en: 「因材施教」means "to teach according to students' aptitude".
explanation.ko: 「因材施教」는 '학생 능력에 맞춰 가르치다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 好的老师应该做到___，根据学生的特点调整教学方法。(A good teacher should teach according to students' aptitude, adjusting teaching methods based on students' characteristics.)

explanation.en: 「教育资源分配」means "distribution of educational resources".
explanation.ko: 「教育资源分配」는 '교육 자원 분배'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 这个偏远地区面临着严重的___不均衡的问题。(This remote area faces the serious problem of unequal distribution of educational resources.)
这所学校的___非常先进，注重学生的全面发展。(This school's educational philosophy is very advanced, emphasizing students' well-rounded development.)
尽管政府投入了大量资金，___教育不公平的现象依然存在。(Although the government invested a large amount of funds, educational inequity still exists.)
无论出身如何，每个孩子___应该享有平等的受教育机会。(No matter their background, every child should have equal educational opportunities.)
除非我们彻底改革教育体系，___教育公平很难真正实现。(Unless we thoroughly reform the education system, educational equity will be hard to truly achieve.)
在线教育之所以受到欢迎，___是因为它打破了地域限制。(Online education became popular precisely because it broke down geographical limitations.)

explanation.en: 「一方面〜另一方面〜」means "on one hand 〜, on the other hand 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一方面〜另一方面〜」는 '한편으로는 ~, 다른 한편으로는 ~'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一方面学校要提高教学质量，___方面也要关注学生的心理健康。(On one hand schools need to improve teaching quality, on the other hand they also need to pay attention to students' mental health.)
这项教育政策___了城乡教育资源的差距。(This education policy narrowed the gap in educational resources between urban and rural areas.)
在线教育为偏远地区的学生___了接触优质教育资源的机会。(Online education provided students in remote areas with opportunities to access high-quality educational resources.)
这所大学___了创新型人才培养模式，广受好评。(This university explored an innovative talent cultivation model, widely praised.)
这项奖学金政策旨在___贫困学生完成学业。(This scholarship policy aims to help underprivileged students complete their studies.)
这所学校鼓励学生___自己的兴趣，而不是盲目跟风。(This school encourages students to pursue their own interests, rather than blindly following trends.)

explanation.en: The verb 缩小 (narrow) must come before its object 城乡教育资源的差距 (the urban-rural education resource gap): 缩小城乡教育资源的差距 (not 城乡缩小教育资源的差距).
explanation.ko: 동사 '缩小'는 목적어 '城乡教育资源的差距' 앞에 와야 하므로 '缩小城乡教育资源的差距'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 实现教育公平需要城乡缩小教育资源的差距。(Achieving educational equity requires narrowing the gap in educational resources between urban and rural areas.) — find the error
choices: 实现教育公平需要缩小城乡教育资源的差距。
实现教育公平需要城乡缩小教育资源的差距。
实现教育公平需要教育资源缩小城乡的差距。
实现教育公平需要缩小教育资源城乡的差距。

explanation.en: 「都」must come before 应该 (should): 都应该 (not 应该都).
explanation.ko: 「都」는 '应该' 앞에 와야 하므로 '都应该'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 无论出身如何，每个孩子应该都享有平等的受教育机会。(No matter their background, every child should have equal educational opportunities.) — find the error
choices: 无论出身如何，每个孩子都应该享有平等的受教育机会。
无论出身如何，每个孩子应该都享有平等的受教育机会。
无论出身如何，都每个孩子应该享有平等的受教育机会。
无论出身如何，每个孩子享有都应该平等的受教育机会。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 在线教育之所以受到欢迎，因为是它打破了地域限制。(Online education became popular precisely because it broke down geographical limitations.) — find the error
choices: 在线教育之所以受到欢迎，是因为它打破了地域限制。
在线教育之所以受到欢迎，因为是它打破了地域限制。
在线教育之所以受到欢迎，是它因为打破了地域限制。
在线教育之所以受到欢迎，它是因为打破了地域限制。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 实现教育公平需要缩小城乡教育资源的差距 ("Achieving educational equity requires narrowing the gap in educational resources between urban and rural areas").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '实现教育公平需要缩小城乡教育资源的差距' (교육 형평성을 실현하려면 도농 간 교육 자원의 격차를 줄여야 한다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 实现教育公平需要__________。(Achieving educational equity requires narrowing the gap in educational resources between urban and rural areas.)
words: 缩小城乡教育资源的差距
questions.answer: 缩小城乡教育资源的差距

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 无论出身如何，每个孩子都应该享有平等的受教育机会 ("No matter their background, every child should have equal educational opportunities").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '无论出身如何，每个孩子都应该享有平等的受教育机会' (출신이 어떻든 모든 아이는 평등한 교육 기회를 누려야 한다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 无论出身如何，每个孩子__________享有平等的受教育机会。(No matter their background, every child should have equal educational opportunities.)
